response: Imagine you’re holding a standard American blue electrical plug with two flat prongs. You’re about to plug it into one of three different wall outlets: one with two round holes, another with two wide, flat slots, or a third with two flat slots plus a grounding pin. Which outlet will safely accept your plug?

meta.system: Reword this puzzle in a different natural style, SAME facts, SAME question. Reply ONLY the reworded text.
meta.user: You have a blue US plug. Put it into one of these wall sockets: the round-pin socket, the flat-pin socket, or the three-pin socket. Which one?
